source: local Domain Intelligence Engine only (pattern matched: Entity-Record Management)

domainAwarePages.pagePurpose: Primary workspace for managing Employee Management end to end - covers the full Entity-Record Management lifecycle.
validations: email must be valid and unique
joiningDate must not be in the future
managerId must reference an active Employee record
required fields (name, department, email) must be present before activation
navigation: Detail drawer opens from list row click
Back to list from detail view
domainAwarePages.emptyState: No Employee records yet - show a "Create Employee" call to action.
domainAwarePages.loadingState: Skeleton rows while Employee list is fetched.
domainAwarePages.errorState: Inline error banner with retry if Employee list/detail fails to load.
permissionRules: HR Staff / Record Owner can view/act according to the Entity-Record Management role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.
Manager / Supervisor can view/act according to the Entity-Record Management role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.
Admin can view/act according to the Entity-Record Management role matrix - see requirement-scope.json for per-step authorization.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Create Employee Profile (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Create Employee Profile" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Verify & Validate Employee Details (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Verify & Validate Employee Details" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Submit for Manager Approval (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Submit for Manager Approval" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Manager Reviews Employee Record (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Manager / Supervisor can perform "Manager Reviews Employee Record" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Approve Employee Record (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Manager / Supervisor can perform "Approve Employee Record" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Activate Employee (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Activate Employee" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Update Employee Information (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: HR Staff / Record Owner can perform "Update Employee Information" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Deactivate / Offboard Employee (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Deactivate / Offboard Employee" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Audit Log Capture (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: System can perform "Audit Log Capture" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

domainAwareRequirements.title: Generate Employee Reports (Employee Management)
domainAwareRequirements.acceptanceCriteria: Admin can perform "Generate Employee Reports" only when business rules and validations for Employee are satisfied; result is reflected in status and audit trail.

note: 10 domain-aware requirements/pages below define actual Employee Management business behavior (Entity-Record Management pattern) - the generic page list above only covers page-level CRUD scaffolding from the platform's own requirements. Implement both sets.
